summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM application fixes: Tool creation, filter dropdowns styling, bulk assignment, and activity log email display. All 16 backend API tests passed. All 6 frontend UI tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Created test tools via API and UI during testing (TEST_ prefixed tools cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported issues have been fixed and verified: 1) Tool creation works with all fields (name, description, URL, category, status, cookies). 2) Filter dropdowns on Tools, Clients, and Activity pages have proper dark theme styling (bg-toolstack-bg with white text). 3) Bulk assignment endpoint works correctly - /bulk route is now before /:clientId routes. 4) Activity log displays user emails in the Details column. API routes are under /api/crm/ prefix.

tool_creation.evidence: Created 'UI Test Tool Creation' via UI successfully, API tests for tool CRUD all passed

filter_dropdowns_styling.evidence: All filter dropdowns on Tools, Clients, Activity pages have bg-toolstack-bg (rgb(30, 31, 36)) with white text

bulk_assignment.evidence: API test test_bulk_assign_tool passed, UI shows bulk assignment page working correctly

activity_log_emails.evidence: Activity log Details column shows emails like 'admin@toolstack.com logged in', 'admin@toolstack.com created UI Test Tool Creation'
